biological_replicate: Human NP tissues were obtained from 14 patients who suffered from thoracolumbar fracture, scoliosis or IDD and underwent spinal surgery.
technical_replicate: Two microliters of solution was injected into the center of the NP region...
experimental_design: in vivo and in vitro models
To further assess the role of lysine methylation in IDD progression in vivo...
factor_value: SUV39H2 is responsible for the K141 mono-methylation of PPP1CA.
